title: try_parse_simple_space_prop doc claims _ arm is unreachable
description: The doc comment on try_parse_simple_space_prop says 'The _ arm below is unreachable by construction — it exists to ensure the match stays exhaustive as new arms are added.' The _ arm IS reachable and intentionally so: it returns None for any path that is not a simple property (e.g. 'members/abc'), which is the signal for the caller to try member-patch parsing. Saying it's unreachable will confuse a future contributor. Fix: rewrite the comment to accurately describe the arm as the catch-all for non-simple-prop paths.
close_reason: Already fixed in commit 4037366 — current code has correct comment on _ arm and accurate function doc
